properties.activity_description: To excavate below groundwater on contaminated soils, divert and abstract groundwater associated with dewatering and excavation, and discharged treated water to land.
Discharge treated sediment laden dewatered groundwater and stormwater from areas of earthworks and contaminated soils to land where it may enter water

To undertake earthworks over an area exceeding 3000m2, including dewatering and the associated discharge of sediment laden runoff, to facilitate active transport upgrades to the Thorndon Quay road corridor as part of the Let's Get Wellington Moving Project.
To discharge contaminants to air from the operation of emergency diesel generators.
Extend culvert. Regrade and recompact batter slopes. Regrade stream bed. Place rocks for fish passage.
to occupy the coastal marine area with a seawall.
To occupy the coastal marine area with a seawall extension.
To occupy the coastal marine area with a seawall extension.

Coastal permit to deposit sand, shingle, shell, or other material on the foreshore in connection with placing, and extending rock armour around the northern side of the Kumutoto Stream mouth, adjacent to Tug Wharf, and a small section immediately seaward of the Steamship Wharf building.
Land use consent to construct a number of bores (including test pits) associated with groundwater monitoring.
Occupy cma in areas outside the LHDMA
Occupy Kumutoto Area
Structures within the Lambton Harbour Development Area
Coastal permit to construct, maintain and remove structures in the coastal marine area
Coastal permit to deposit sand, shingle, shell, or other material on the foreshore in connection with placing, and extending rock armour.

Water permit to take and divert water in connection with diverting and taking groundwater during excavation and construction of the basement carpark and carpark access areas and following completion of the basement.
To permanently divert groundwater during and post construction of the basement level of a commercial building.
To establish, operate and maintain a motorhome park.
To discharge contaminants to land, air and water in circumstances when they may enter water associated with wet abrasive blasting undertaken for bridge maintenance
To undertake dewatering at 61 Molesworth Street, Thorndon, Wellington and discharge this water to the municipal stormwater network.
Land use consent - bore (excavation below groundwater and dewatering spears)
To undertake dewatering at 61 Molesworth Street, Thorndon, Wellington and discharge this water to the municipal stormwater network.
To occupy the coastal marine area with additions and alterations to protected wharf and reclamation edges
To enable dewatering and earthworks across 2,860m2 (including winter works) to enable Stage D of the Inner Port Upgrade.
To enable dewatering and earthworks across 2,860m2 (including winter works) to enable Stage D of the Inner Port Upgrade.
To enable dewatering and earthworks across 2,860m2 (including winter works) to enable Stage D of the Inner Port Upgrade.
To occupy the CMA with wharf pile structures under an existing section of Kings Wharf
To construct 81 new light poles along the Wellington Waterfront promenade, to create consistent lighting that will improve the visibility and safety for people.
To place, use, maintain, and occupy the coastal marine area with an antenna located on a building of Historic Merit.
Construction and use of a new modular building and associated wire mesh security fence on the deck of the Railway (Interisland) Wharf in Lambton Harbour.
